howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first tap to sitting down together—four simple steps.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.body: Tell us your city, interests, and how you like to meet—so we can surface the right circles.

steps.title: Discover & filter
steps.body: Browse dinners, coffee runs, and socials near you. Save what looks good for later.

steps.title: Book your spot
steps.body: Reserve a seat with clear time, place, and group size—no endless DMs.

steps.title: Show up & connect
steps.body: Meet face-to-face, then keep the conversation going in-app when it feels right.

eventTypes.title: Meetups for every mood
eventTypes.subtitle: Host or join the format that fits your week—from quiet tables to active crews.

types.label: Dinner & tables
types.description: Small groups, shared plates, real conversation—matched to Social meets in your city.

types.label: Coffee & chats
types.description: Breakfast clubs and café hangs—browse Professional and daytime circles.

types.label: Runs & wellness
types.description: Move together: jogs, walks, and active mornings.

types.label: Parties & games
types.description: Mixers, board nights, and bigger rooms when you want energy.

testimonials.title: People who showed up
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from hosts and members in our community.

quotes.quote: I’ve tried a dozen apps—this is the first where people actually arrived on time and stayed after dessert.
quotes.name: Maya K.

quotes.quote: Hosting felt structured, not stressful. The checklist meant I could focus on guests, not logistics.
quotes.name: James L.

quotes.quote: Found my running group here. Same time every week, same friendly faces.
quotes.name: Priya R.

closingCta.title: Ready to meet someone new this week?
closingCta.body: Browse what’s live near you or put your own meet on the map—it only takes a few minutes.
